---
title: "Evaluation Knowledge Base"
page-layout: full
toc: false
---

<div class="landing-stack">

::: {.hero-panel}
<span class="hero-eyebrow">Evaluation study notes</span>

# Evaluation Knowledge Base

A Quarto knowledge base for source-grounded notes on evaluation books and guidance. The site now integrates ready `evaluation-texts` records from the MCP research library, with detailed notes for Purposeful Program Theory, chapter-level Rossi/Lipsey, Chen, Impact Evaluation in Practice, and Realistic Evaluation notes, step-level Patton/U-FE notes, and generated notes for the wider collection.

::: {.cta-row}
[Open Notes](notes/index.qmd){.cta-button}
[Purposeful Program Theory](notes/purposeful-programme-theory/index.qmd){.cta-button .secondary}
[Export BibTeX](references.bib){.cta-button .secondary}
:::
:::

::: {.section-grid}
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-book">Book notes</span>

### [Purposeful Program Theory](notes/purposeful-programme-theory/index.qmd)

Theories of change, theories of action, logic models, assumptions, and causal inference for program theory use.
:::
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-book">Book notes</span>

### [Practical Program Evaluation](notes/practical-program-evaluation/index.qmd)

A practice-oriented guide to matching evaluation types, program stages, logic models, and program theory.
:::
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-book">Book notes</span>

### [Qualitative Research & Evaluation Methods](notes/qualitative-research-evaluation-methods/index.qmd)

Qualitative inquiry for evaluation questions where context, meaning, process, and use matter.
:::
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-book">Book notes</span>

### [Realistic Evaluation](notes/realistic-evaluation/index.qmd)

A realist approach to explaining what works, for whom, in what circumstances, and why.
:::
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-book">Book notes</span>

### [Impact Evaluation in Practice](notes/impact-evaluation-in-practice/index.qmd)

Impact evaluation design around theory of change, counterfactuals, questions, methods, data, and implementation timing.
:::
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-book">Book notes</span>

### [Handbook of Practical Program Evaluation](notes/handbook-practical-program-evaluation/index.qmd)

A broad handbook on evaluation planning, stakeholder engagement, monitoring, study designs, and use.
:::
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-book">Book notes</span>

### [Evaluation: A Systematic Approach](notes/evaluation-systematic-approach/index.qmd)

A systematic evaluation framework covering questions, needs, theory, process, impact, efficiency, and use.
:::
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-book">Book notes</span>

### [Essentials of Utilization-Focused Evaluation](notes/essentials-utilization-focused-evaluation/index.qmd)

A compact guide to designing evaluations for primary intended users and actual use.
:::
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-book">Book notes</span>

### [Magenta Book](notes/magenta-book/index.qmd)

UK central government guidance on evaluation scoping, methods, data, management, dissemination, and capability.
:::
::: {.section-card}
<span class="page-badge badge-book">Book notes</span>

### [Evaluation Theory, Models, and Applications](notes/evaluation-theory-models-applications/index.qmd)

A survey and assessment of evaluation theory, models, standards, CIPP, metaevaluation, and applications.
:::
:::

</div>
